---
title: "Session 5: Routing and route networks"
pagetitle: "Session 5"
---

# Routing and route network analysis

This session covers routing and route network analysis using R.

## Learning objectives

- Set up a routing engine interface
- Calculate routes and distances
- Use GTFS data
- Analyse route networks

## Routing with dodgr

```r
library(dodgr)

# Build a route network
graph = weight_streetnet(osm_data)

# Find shortest paths
paths = dodgr_paths(graph, from = c(-1.5, 53.8), to = c(-1.4, 53.7))
```

## GTFS data

```r
library(tidytransit)

# Read a GTFS feed
gtfs = read_gtfs("gtfs.zip")
```
